sentences.english: Explain why you would spend it that way.
My ideal weekend is a balance of productive activities and complete relaxation.
sentences.korean: 이상적인 주말은 생산적인 활동과 완전한 휴식의 균형이에요.

sentences.english: On Saturday morning I would wake up without an alarm have a slow breakfast and go for a long run along the Han River.
sentences.korean: 토요일 아침에는 알람 없이 일어나 느긋한 아침을 먹고 한강을 따라 긴 달리기를 하겠어요.

sentences.english: In the afternoon I'd meet friends at a cafe and spend a few hours just talking and laughing.
sentences.korean: 오후에는 카페에서 친구를 만나 몇 시간 동안 그냥 대화하고 웃겠어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Sunday would be my quiet day — reading a book cooking a nice dinner and watching a movie before bed.
sentences.korean: 일요일은 조용한 날이 될 거예요 — 책을 읽고 맛있는 저녁을 요리하고 자기 전에 영화를 보겠어요.

sentences.english: This mix of activity and rest recharges me for the week ahead.
sentences.korean: 활동과 휴식의 이 조합이 다가오는 한 주를 위해 나를 재충전시켜줘요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Attending a Large vs. Small School
